description_long: This is an ornate necklace featuring three large, intricately designed floral motifs arranged vertically along the chain. Each flower is composed of multiple petal-like elements, encrusted with numerous small, sparkling stones that give the piece a luxurious and eye-catching appearance. The chain itself is slender and golden, providing a delicate contrast to the bold, decorative centerpiece. The necklace is displayed on a white bust, highlighting the detailed craftsmanship and the reflective quality of the stones. The overall design is highly decorative, with a strong emphasis on symmetry and floral inspiration. The piece exudes elegance and is likely intended for formal or special occasions.
description: An elaborate gold necklace with three large, gemstone-encrusted floral motifs on a delicate chain, exuding luxury and elegance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of three large, ornate floral motifs with sparkling stones on a gold chain.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the necklace's profile and the way the chain drapes over the bust, with the floral motifs visible in partial relief.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the thin gold chain encircling the neck, with no decorative elements visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, displaying the chain's drape and the edge of the floral motifs.
